classes.name: Berserker
classes.description: A vicious fighter who can Rage to take less damage and obliterate foes with overwhelming furious assaults. While they can run out of Stamina, their explosive damage is unsurpassed.

classes.name: Monk
classes.description: A precise fighter who is efficient with using its Stamina. They specialize in unarmed strikes to lethal effect, have fastest Run, and use Discipline to attack. Able to Chant Heal.

classes.name: Rogue
classes.description: A tricky fighter who is the best at using Tools and deceiving foes. Their accuracy is unsurpassed while attacking from Hidden. Able to use Actions by expending Cunning.

classes.name: Warrior
classes.description: An unstoppable fighter who can withstand a tide of attacks and come out unscathed. Refuses to die at Death’s Door by expending Surge to Heal and recover Stamina.

classes.name: Enchanter
classes.description: Unsurpassed at controlling the Mind and Actions of their foes and equally powerful at enhancing their allies’ capabilities. Expends Focus to enhance their Tactical Spells.

classes.name: Necromancer
classes.description: Builds and customizes an Abomination minion, transforms their Body into a Lich form, and can expend Grave charges to raise multiple undead: skeletons, zombies, or ghosts.

classes.name: Sorcerer
classes.description: Specializes in chosen spells which they can Morph to gain multiple new effects. Able to unleash chaotic bursts of spontaneous magic and use select Chants, such as Heal.

classes.name: Wizard
classes.description: Experts at learning a variety of useful Spells and some Chants. Powerful offensive casters. They can expend Power charges to double the damage of their Attack Spells and Chants.

classes.name: Cleric
classes.description: A highly durable chanter that is not afraid to fight on the front lines. Experts at using Heal/Harm, they are the best at inflicting harm to Undead and Fiends and reviving the dead.

classes.name: Disciple
classes.description: A martial healer that mixes expending Stamina and Morale to soothe their allies and harm their foes by alternating between Attack Maneuvers and Attack Chants.

classes.name: Druid
classes.description: Capable of transforming into customized Beast Forms. Attuned to nature, able to expend Creation charges to improve Heal or deliver devastating Elemental Attack Chants.

classes.name: Shaman
classes.description: A martial combatant proficient with spears. Experts at bolstering with spiritual enhancements and debilitating foes with curses. Expends Spiritual charges to apply Barrier.

classes.name: Adventurer
classes.description: The class that does it all, just not as well as others. A chaotic mix of customization, flexibility, and more proficiencies than anyone else.

classes.name: Bard
classes.description: Experts at emboldening allies with Songs and a versatile list of abilities, including some Spells. Inspires allies to improve their rolls or instantly Chant Heal/Harm from afar.

classes.name: Mimic
classes.description: Masters of mimicry who temporarily copy the abilities of their foes. They can Consume a grabbed enemy to permanently learn their abilities.

classes.name: Beastlord
classes.description: Masters of communing with the spirit of the world, they fight alongside their bestial attendants called Warders, which they customize as they progress on their spiritual journey.

classes.name: Paladin
classes.description: A durable knight crusader capable of instantly reciting Heal/Harm with Lay on Hands. A bane against Fiends and Undead, with an Aura and the ability to Revive.

classes.name: Ranger
classes.description: An expert of wilderness exploration, friend to beasts, and able to harry foes with a falcon. Can instantly recite Heal/Harm and remove Afflictions.

classes.name: Shadowknight
classes.description: A knight crusader who can instantly recite Heal/Harm to enshroud themselves in shadow or inflict excruciating pain. Commands a skeletal squire in service.

classes.name: Bloodmage
classes.description: A grisly mage who uses the vitality of their Stamina and Health Points to empower their magic. Forms Blood Bonds between foes and allies to enhance spells.

classes.name: Dragoon
classes.description: An armored, glaive-wielding combatant who seeks to raise a dragon as their companion. Their Breath Weapon is devastating, and their ability to leap onto and mount foes is unmatched.

classes.name: Spellblade
classes.description: A dashing combatant who blends slashing and spellcasting seamlessly. Alternates martial and magical attacks to gain White and Black Energy to enhance both.

classes.name: Warden
classes.description: Knights who excel at countering magic and turning spells back on foes. They enhance allied magic users and wield staffs with great effectiveness.

classes.name: Conjurer
classes.description: A magi who has mastered the art of bringing forth objects and entities from the ether. They excel at commanding elemental and otherworldly beings as minions.

classes.name: Elementalist
classes.description: A magi who embodies the elements they control. They attune to a specific element at a time to gain benefits from their form and modify their attack magics to match their attunement.

classes.name: Occultist
classes.description: A magi who excels at debilitating foes with long-lasting curses, covering the battlefield in darkness, and animating objects to fight for them. Especially formidable atop their flying broom.

classes.name: Ritualist
classes.description: A magi who beckons forth spirits of the ancients to heed their call and cast their magics for them. By binding foes in spiritual chains, they can control them.

classes.name: Chronomancer
classes.description: Manipulators of time and space who focus on enhancing allies and debilitating foes, while remaining competent combatants with their weaponry.

classes.name: Inventor
classes.description: A mechanical mastermind who creates a customizable Construct, wields a mighty spanner to strike foes, and specializes in explosive tools and alchemical elixirs.

classes.name: Sage
classes.description: Masters of all magic who harness High Magic to unleash the strongest abilities of all: Evocations. Immensely powerful but highly vulnerable.
